title: damrongia orientalis
intro: Damrongia orientalis, also known as the "King of Bitters," is a plant species native to Thailand and other parts of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Damrongia orientalis include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
